name: HeaderLink

files.content: --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'astro/types' type Props = HTMLAttributes<'a'> const { href, class: className = '', ...props } = Astro.props ---

visual_summary: A link component that is visually represented as a styled <a> tag, used in a header where a developer would want to link to another page or website.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics: Name: HeaderLink Description: A link component that is visually represented as a styled tag, used in a header where a developer would want to link to another page or website. Style: material, minimal, responsive Interactions: clickable, hover Tags: header, link, anchor Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // src/components/HeaderLink.astro --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'astro/types' type Props = HTMLAttributes<'a'> const { href, class: className = '', ...props } = Astro.props ---
